message:
Running command: # SAME TAIL for 10 minutes! after_grt.guide exists (from first GRT run), but openroad-globalrouting.log
# is still 0 bytes. The flow.log hasn't advanced past the STA warnings.
# This is suspicious - OpenROAD may have hung loading the guide file for the second GRT.
# Let's check the CPU and memory usage
ps -p $(cat /tmp/pnr_v4.pid) -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,rss,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null
echo "---check for child processes---"
pstree -p $(cat /tmp/pnr_v4.pid) 2>/dev/null | head -5 || ps --ppid $(cat /tmp/pnr_v4.pid) -o pid,cmd --no-header 2>/dev/null | head -5
